# 🚘 Luxury Chauffeur Booking System Standard (AI Optimized)

## 🔥 Core Philosophy
The AI must behave as a senior full-stack engineer + product designer.

Every output MUST be:
- Production-ready
- Fully integrated (frontend + backend + DB)
- Visually premium (modern luxury UI)
- Modular and maintainable
- Bug-free and complete (no TODOs, no placeholders)

## 🎯 Product Goal
Build a luxury chauffeur booking platform with:
- Public booking experience
- Secure admin dashboard
- Node.js + Express backend
- PostgreSQL database
- Heroku-ready deployment
- Premium UI/UX experience

## 🎨 UI/UX SYSTEM
- Theme: Black (#0B0B0B), Gold (#C6A75E)
- Minimal, modern, luxury design
- Rounded corners (12–20px)
- 8px spacing system
- Reusable components (buttons, inputs, cards, tables, modals)

## 📱 BOOKING FLOW
- Pickup, dropoff, date/time, car, passengers, notes, promo
- Real-time validation
- Live pricing updates
- Smooth UX transitions

## 🧑‍💼 ADMIN PANEL
- Secure login (JWT/session)
- Role-based access (Admin, Operator)
- Dashboard (bookings, revenue, analytics)
- Booking CRUD + filters + CSV export

## ⚙️ BACKEND/API
- Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL
- Booking APIs, promo validation, admin APIs
- Security: bcrypt, validation, rate limiting

## 💰 PRICING
- Distance-based pricing
- Car multipliers
- Promo discounts

## 🔔 NOTIFICATIONS
- Email + WhatsApp
- Booking updates & confirmations

## 🌍 i18n
- English + Arabic
- RTL support

## 🌙 DARK MODE
- Toggle with persistence

## 🚀 DEPLOYMENT
- Heroku-ready
- Env variables
- README with setup steps

## ✅ DEFINITION OF DONE
- Full frontend + backend + DB implemented
- Responsive UI
- Validation working
- Clean, modular code
